roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL: PRE-HEARING CONFERENCE, TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING OR DISPOSITION/INTC/FAVRPT/CONTD: PRE-HEARING CONFERENCE, TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING OR DISPOSITION/DOP/

/CAL: DEFENSE MOTION FOR ELECTRONIC MONITORING MODIFICATION/INTC/STWPX/WS/EMMOD: THE DEFENDANT WILL REMAIN ON HOME DETENTION EXCEPT BETWEEN THE HOURS OF 7AM TO 7PM MONDAY TO FRIDAY FOR EMPLOYMENT PURPOSES ONLY,  THAT INCLUDES GETTING TO AND FROM HIS EMPLOYER'S LOCATION,/CONTD: PRE-HEARING CONFERENCE, TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING OR DISPOSITION/DOP/

/CAL: STATUS OF CUSTODY/INTC/CTORD: THE DEFENDANT IS ALLOWED TO GO TO HISEMPLOYER TO OBTAIN DOCUMENTS FOR NEXT COURT DATE ON OCTOBER 06, 2021 ONLYBETWEEN THE HOURS OF 10AM AND 4PM,/CONTD: ELECTORNIC MODIFICATIONS /DOP/

/CAL: PRE-HEARING CONFERENCE AND PENDING STAY AWAY ORDER/INTC/ACM/X:AS ACONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BYTHE SFSO/CTORD: HOME DETENTION/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTERA COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/WS/CONTD: 10-05-21 STATUS OF CUSTODY/DOP/CONTD: 10-12-21 PRELIMINARY HEARING/TE: 90 MINUTES/DOP/

/CAL: SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT/DAWT/X: SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT ISDISCHARGED WITH NO CONTEMPT/BAIL: 25,000/X: BAIL IS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE,/X: FUTURE COURT DATE IS CONFIRMED,/CONTD: CUSTODY STATUS & STATUS OF M99#21009586/DOPC/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/TEXT:CONFL CNSL APPTD/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE DECLARES A CONFLICT,/CON: NEIL HALLINAN/X: SPECIAL APPEARANCE BY CONFLICT COUNSEL, EAN VIZZI,/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW60/LDPX: 11-09-21 (60TH)/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPSDEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ONTHE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/WS/SA2: 500 BLOCK OF LARKIN ST, SF/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL: DA TO DISMISS/INTC/EMTERM/MO PC 1385: PLEA TO OTHER CHARGE/
